batch_planning.why: Stable long-context planner with strong instruction following and controlled reasoning-oriented fallbacks.

batch_prose.why: Primary prose model favors creative long-form output with stylistically consistent and reliable fallback alternatives.

batch_editing.why: Editing prefers instruction precision and dependable rewrite behavior while retaining high-quality backup models.

repair_json.why: JSON repair prioritizes strict format compliance and deterministic structured output behavior.

coherence_check.why: Coherence checking prioritizes long-context reasoning for contradiction detection across chapter-scale context.
